title: Include default clause in switch statements
description: Switch statements without default clauses may miss handling unexpected values, leading to silent failures. A default clause provides defensive programming and ensures all cases are explicitly considered.
recommendation: Add a default clause that handles unexpected cases or contains explanatory comments.

noncompliant.description: Switch statements without default clauses can leave cases unhandled, potentially causing silent failures or unexpected behavior.

compliant.description: Including default clauses ensures all cases are handled explicitly, preventing silent failures and making code more robust.

checks.message: Switch statements should include a default clause to handle unexpected cases.
